title: M.A Jobs 2026 – Project Technical Support III
shortInfo: ICMR NIIRNCD Recruitment 2026: ICMR National Institute for Implementation Research (ICMR NIIRNCD) has announced a Walk-in Interview for 1 Project Technical Support – III post. Eligible candidates with Graduate degree and Postgraduate degree can attend the walk-in interview on 08 June 2026.

basic_details.job_title: ICMR NIIRNCD Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR National Institute for Implementation Research
basic_details.short_information: ICMR NIIRNCD Recruitment 2026: ICMR National Institute for Implementation Research (ICMR NIIRNCD) has announced a Walk-in Interview for 1 Project Technical Support – III post. Eligible candidates with Graduate degree and Postgraduate degree can attend the walk-in interview on 08 June 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation admissible for SC/ST/OBC candidates, retrenched Government Employees, Departmental Candidates and Ex-servicemen as per Central Government/DoPT/ICMR instructions.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degree with 3 years' experience OR Postgraduate degree in specified fields.
qualification.details: Graduate degree in Clinical Psychology/Cognitive & Neuroscience / Clinical Pharmacy /Psychology/Public Health/Psychiatric Social Work / Social Work/ Sociology/Microbiology/ Biochemistry /Zoology/Chemistry with 3 years' post-qualification experience. Postgraduate degree in Clinical Psychology/Cognitive & Neuroscience / Clinical Pharmacy / Psychology / Public Health / Psychiatric Social Work / Social Work / Sociology /Microbiology/Biochemistry/Zoology/Chemistry.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Project Technical Support – III post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Technical Support – III post is scheduled for 08 June 2026. Candidates should report on this date.

faq.question: What is the eligibility criteria for the Project Technical Support – III position?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Graduate degree with 3 years of post-qualification experience or a Postgraduate degree in specified fields like Clinical Psychology, Public Health, Microbiology, etc.

faq.question: What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC, SC/ST categories for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support – III post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 28,000/- per month plus HRA.

faq.question: What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview/Written Test, followed by a Skill Test (if applicable), and a Merit List based on performance.

faq.question: Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at ICMR National Institute for Implementation Research (ICMR NIIRNCD) in Jodhpur, Rajasthan.

faq.question: What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual position. The job type is contractual.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
